ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic process */,
  "process_type" TEXT /* Type of the academic process (e.g., Audit, Course Drop) */,
  "form_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a form is required for the process */,
  "where_to_submit" TEXT /* Where the form or request should be submitted */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions that must be met for the process */,
  "estimated_review_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for review of the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the process */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Specific criteria that students must meet to be eligible for the process */,
  "reviewer_role" TEXT /* The role of the person who will review the process (e.g., adviser, administrator) */,
  "rejection_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which a request can be rejected */,
  "form_template_path" TEXT /* File path to the template form for the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's adviser */,
  "major" TEXT /* The student's major */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* The year the student is in (e.g., freshman, sophomore) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The student's date of birth */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The student's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* The student's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES advisers ("adviser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisers" (
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adviser */,
  "adviser_name" TEXT /* Full name of the adviser */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adviser */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the adviser belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* The location of the adviser's office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The adviser's phone number */,
  "availability" TEXT /* The adviser's availability schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adviser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the request */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic process type */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the request was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the adviser or administrator who reviewed the request */,
  "reviewed_date" TEXT /* Date the request was reviewed */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the request */,
  "additional_documents" TEXT /* File paths to any additional documents submitted */,
  "review_due_date" TEXT /* The due date for the review */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the last person who updated the request */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* The date the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES academic_processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES advisers ("adviser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the form is associated with */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of the form (e.g., Audit Request Form, Course Drop Request Form) */,
  "form_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the form document */,
  "form_submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the form was submitted */,
  "form_version" TEXT /* The version of the form */,
  "form_status" TEXT /* The status of the form (e.g., submitted, reviewed, approved) */,
  "form_completion_date" TEXT /* The date the form was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forms_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being approved */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adviser or administrator who approved the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the approval was given */,
  "approval_note" TEXT /* Note from the adviser or administrator regarding the approval */,
  "approval_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the approval */,
  "approval_method" TEXT /* The method used for approval (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES advisers ("adviser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rejections" (
  "rejection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rejection */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being rejected */,
  "adviser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adviser or administrator who rejected the request */,
  "rejection_date" TEXT /* Date the rejection was given */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rejection */,
  "rejection_method" TEXT /* The method used for rejection (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rejection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rejections_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rejections_adviser_id FOREIGN KEY ("adviser_id") REFERENCES advisers ("adviser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic process type */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the condition is required for the process */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* The type of condition (e.g., academic, administrative) */,
  "condition_description_long" TEXT /* A longer, more detailed description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_conditions_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES academic_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who reviewed the request */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_note" TEXT /* Note from the reviewer regarding the review */,
  "review_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the review */,
  "review_method" TEXT /* The method used for the review (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_reviews_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES advisers ("adviser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being tracked */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., status update, form submission) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the person who made the change */,
  "change_method" TEXT /* The method used for the change (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., system admin, department admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the administrator belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The administrator's phone number */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* The location of the administrator's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
